The '''''EX-F''''' was an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Warship/Legends|warship]] used as a testbed for new gunnery and [[Engine/Legends|engine]] technologies. It was part of the [[Black Fleet]], which was captured by the [[Alien/Legends|alien]] [[Yevetha]] towards the end of [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]]. Renamed the '''''Glory of Yevetha''''' by them, she was eventually reclaimed by the [[Imperial Remnant]] in [[17 ABY/Legends|17 ABY]] and renamed the '''''Rakehell''''', only to be destroyed at the [[Battle of Anx Minor]] within the same year.

==History==
The ''EX-F'' was a ship that served in the Black Fleet.<ref name="TCSWE" /> Outfitted for weapons and drive testing before the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]], she attracted the attention of [[Alliance Intelligence/Legends|Alliance Intelligence]]. The vessel disappeared from records some time before Endor; she was next reported eight months after the battle, when she was berthed at the [[Black Fifteen]] shipyards at [[N'zoth]] in the [[Koornacht Cluster/Legends|Koornacht Cluster]], a facility assigned to [[Sixth Negative Regions|Black Sword Command]].

Following the [[Yevetha]]n seizure of the [[Black Fleet]], the ''EX-F'' was renamed the ''Glory'', although the Yevetha were unable to understand her [[Engine/Legends|engine]] technology even after twelve years of reverse-engineering. She accordingly missed out on the opening stages of the [[Yevethan Purge]]. She was moved afterward to [[Doornik-319|Morning Bell]].<ref name="SOL">''[[Shield of Lies]]''</ref>

In [[17 ABY/Legends|17 ABY]], she was recaptured by the Imperial survivors, who the Yevetha had retained for their technical knowledge, and along with the rest of the Imperial ships in the Black Fleet, she departed Koornacht for the [[Deep Core/Legends|Deep Core]], though her crew soon after opted to join the forces of the [[Imperial Remnant]] in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]].<ref name="TNEC" /> During the [[Battle of Anx Minor]] in [[17 ABY/Legends|17 ABY]], the ''EX-F'', known at this time as the ''Rakehell'',<ref name="TEGTW" /> was destroyed when her [[antimatter]] containment was breached, wiping out several other [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyers]] in the process.<ref name="TNEC" />
